mapper.insert: INSERT INTO documents (title, owner_id, latest_snapshot, version, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{ownerId}, #{latestSnapshot}, 1, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.title, d.owner_id as ownerId, dm.role as myRole, d.updated_at as updatedAt FROM documents d INNER JOIN document_members dm ON d.id = dm.document_id WHERE dm.user_id = #{userId} AND d.status = 0 ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE documents SET title = #{title}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE documents SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
